specific_location: Tamarack Ranch, just w. of County Road 81
description: Spotted/Eastern type towhee, with black head, chest, and back. Wings black except two tertials narrowly tipped in white and a white "box" at base of folded primaries. Sides "rufous" and brightly colored, contrasting with bright white center to belly and cream-yellow undertail coverts. Narrow and abbreviated black line extending down from chest between rufous sides and white uppermost white belly. Eye red, bill black, white tail spots long, approaching tip of undertail coverts.Behaviors: Singing atop treeCall: Song: Djeenk chur tee-ee-ee-ee-ee Call: Shrill metallic shureenkPlumage: not determined
